name: EthGetTokenLengthBit
title: EthGetTokenLengthBit
syntax: long EthGetTokenLengthBit( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[] );
description: The function returns the length of a token in bit.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of a packet that has been created with EthInitPacket

return:
length of the token in bit
With EthGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
